name: Will
history: Complex relationship history involving a person named Cricket that affected the patient's social circle. The patient often takes a caretaking role with friends, including a friend named Lucy with ongoing medical issues.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must not show my true feelings or I will be judged.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am never going to be helped.
coping_strategies: Avoids expressing true feelings to prevent judgment and conflict.
situation: Friends are gathered outside the residence waiting while the patient is running late after work.
auto_thought: I am not making sense; I am going to be judged.
behavior: Avoids confrontation and expressing true feelings, leading to internalized blame.
